body.title: Igor context management: summarize-and-swap instead of truncate
body.result: Thread context compaction implemented. When buffer hits 8 exchanges, oldest half summarized via local Ollama (qwen2.5:7b) in background thread. Summary prepended to thread prefix. No restart needed. 156 tests pass.
body.description: Igor loses context mid-conversation (observed 2026-04-11 — Akien told him about cluster/programming/manifest, Igor lost it and responded with canned word-graph answer). When context fills: detect, spawn cheap local summarization call (qwen 7b), replace old context with summary, continue. Like CC compact but for Igor. Connects to T-igor-modes (Awake mode needs good context management).
